videoSnippet.title: The Dragon Never Disappoints || Arjun Erigaisi vs Nils Grandelius || TePe Sigeman & Co 2026
videoSnippet.description:
https://lichess.org/tournament/oqdPR1tl
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Erigaisi Arjun (2751) - Grandelius, Nils (2662)
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.05.03
B76 Sicilian, dragon, Yugoslav attack, Rauser variation

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 g6 6.Be3 Bg7 7.f3 Nc6 8.Qd2 O-O 9.O-O-O d5 10.Nxc6 bxc6 11.Bc4 e6 12.Bb3 Bb7 13.h4 dxe4 14.Qf2 Qc7 15.Nxe4 Nxe4 16.fxe4 c5 17.Bxc5 Rfd8 18.Bxa7 Qe5 19.c3 Qxe4 20.Rxd8+ Rxd8 21.Re1 Qxg2 22.Qxg2 Bxg2 23.a4 Ra8 24.Bb6 Bc6 25.a5 Bf6 26.h5 gxh5 27.Bc2 Bg5+ 28.Kb1 h4 29.Be4 Bxe4+ 30.Rxe4 h3 31.Kc2 h2 32.Re1 Bf4 33.b4 e5 34.b5 e4 35.a6 e3 36.Kd3 e2 37.Rh1 Re8 38.Bf2 Bc7 39.a7 Kg7 40.c4 Bb6 41.a8=Q e1=N+ 42.Rxe1
